metar.rawOb: METAR KOZR 240455Z AUTO 34009KT 10SM CLR 21/10 A3006 RMK AO2 SLP179 T02090098 $

sevenDay.synopsis: IFR cigs should improve by 08L, giving way to a scattered sky. A weak boundary will move thru this PM, kicking up the winds and ushering in some cooler air. I'm not seeing any significant rain chances with this front. Gusty winds again tomorrow behind the front, but no sig wx is expected thru the forecast period. Another boundary slides thru on Saturday. Once again, gusty winds, cooler temps, but no precip.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 23 MAR - 29 MAR
